description: §18.0.2 — an `effect=` attribute on a block-`<match>` arm (`<Idle effect=${...}>`) SHALL fire E-MATCH-EFFECT-FORBIDDEN. Effects presuppose transitions, and transitions do not occur in a read-only match; the diagnostic steers to `<engine for=Type initial=.Variant>` (Tier 2). Regression guard: a match arm is not a transition site, so an effect there is inert-and-misleading and must be rejected.
rationale: §18.0.2: `effect=` declared on any `<match>` arm is a compile error (E-MATCH-EFFECT-FORBIDDEN) — effects presuppose transitions; `match` is read-only on the matched value. Use `<engine for=Type initial=.Variant>` (Tier 2) to attach `effect=` / `<onTransition>`.
